subject: fix(ui): audit sweep — bugs, accessibility, security, debug coverage, docs
body:
Full audit of UI reorganization changes (rev/aud/doc/tap/cln/perf/sec/dbg/imp):

Bug fixes:
- Add missing isMobile, setPlatform, imageAspectRatio to tabContent useMemo deps
- Remove redundant normalizeStructure() call in CellGrid (called twice per render)
- Remove unused getPageCount from useAdState destructuring

Code quality:
- Extract shared UndoRedoButtons component (eliminates duplication between layouts)
- Wrap ContextBar in ErrorBoundary in both MobileLayout and DesktopLayout

Accessibility:
- Bump page dot touch targets to 44px (w-11 h-11) meeting WCAG minimum
- Increase bottom sheet drag handle touch zone (py-3 → py-4)
- Add focus management: move focus to first interactive element on sheet open
- Add focus trap to BurgerMenu (Tab key cycles within open menu)
- Add prefers-reduced-motion support to BottomSheet animations
- Add role="region" + aria-label to BottomSheet
- Add aria-label + aria-current="page" to PageDot buttons

Security:
- Validate theme hex colors via regex before use in inline styles

Debug coverage:
- Add tab change logging (mobile handleMobileTabChange + keyboard shortcuts)
- Add sheet close logging
- Add page navigation logging (swipe + keyboard sources)

Documentation:
- Update USER_GUIDE.md: ContextBar is selection-only, pages in Structure tab
- Update TESTING_GUIDE.md: page add test references Structure tab
- Update CLAUDE.md: Structure tab description, architecture (UndoRedoButtons, BurgerMenu, BottomSheet)
- Update SESSION_NOTES.md with audit summary

Tags: audit, accessibility, security, debug, ui, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-reorganization
Semver: patch
